svg.title: rzilient VPN — High level architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the rzilient VPN platform: developer workflow, CI/CD pipeline, Rails provisioning backend, VPN server infrastructure, and client access flow.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the vpn-portal Go app')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions Docker build work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the DO Container Registry')
sendPrompt('How does the VPN instances API work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Provisioner service do?')
sendPrompt('How does the DigitalOcean provider work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Scaleway provider work?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside the DO VPN server?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside the Scaleway VPN server?')
sendPrompt('How does DNS work for VPN instances?')
sendPrompt('How do team members connect to the VPN?')
sendPrompt('What happens at the vpn-portal home page?')
sendPrompt('How does the WireGuard tunnel work?')
sendPrompt('What can the admin do in the admin panel?')
sendPrompt('How does the admin update button work?')
